behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all three files, mentions the method rename needed, De Morgan transform, and test gates (cargo check/test/clippy/fmt); test-specific strings like 'any_reachable' and 'is_defined_and' can be derived from the described rename and De Morgan transformation of 'is_undefined_or'.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (evaluate cheap predicate first, rename to reflect 'any' semantics, apply De Morgan) without dictating specific code lines; agent must still reason about the implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_lazy_evaluation_pattern forbids any use of '.filter(' and '.all(' and requires the literal name 'any_reachable' with specific ordering of 'predicate(' before '.evaluate(', and test_call_sites_updated requires the exact identifier 'is_defined_and(' — alternative correct fixes using different naming (e.g., 'has_reachable_matching') or a filter+any combination would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run cargo check/test/clippy/fmt subprocesses that execute the code; some tests are text inspection but the suite overall executes behavior via the repo test suite.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_any_reachable_not_stub explicitly requires substantive body content (predicates, reachability_constraints, .evaluate, is_always_false, ≥8 lines), and repo mdtests exercise actual semantic behavior.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The lazy evaluation, rename, De Morgan call-site updates, and build/test gates listed in instruction.md are all covered by corresponding test functions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under clear section headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) with docstrings and tag comments like [pr_diff] fail_to_pass.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies Rust source code, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and command names match repo conventions (crates/ty_python_semantic/..., cargo check -p ty_python_semantic).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files to modify, which is standard scope specification, not specific line numbers or the exact new method name.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, no config edits involved.
